turnover-scheduler.title: Turnover scheduler
turnover-scheduler.blurb: Spot tight changeovers across multiple properties before they cost you a review.

cleaner-dispatch.title: Cleaner dispatch
cleaner-dispatch.blurb: Generate a per-cleaner assignment table, SMS templates, and a printable PDF.

smart-lock-codes.title: Smart lock code rotator
smart-lock-codes.blurb: Deterministic per-booking codes (HMAC-SHA-256). No spreadsheets, no reuse.

linen-par-calculator.title: Linen par calculator
linen-par-calculator.blurb: Sets per bed and per bath, by king/queen mix. Stop running short on changeover day.

restock-calculator.title: Restock calculator
restock-calculator.blurb: Per-month consumables from your booking volume — coffee, paper, soap, all of it.

damage-cost-lookup.title: Damage cost lookup
damage-cost-lookup.primary_keyword: cost to replace items in airbnb
damage-cost-lookup.blurb: Searchable replacement-cost table. Know the number before the guest disputes the claim.

maintenance-schedule.title: Maintenance schedule
maintenance-schedule.blurb: Annual schedule with PDF and .ics export. HVAC, smoke detectors, deep cleans, all on cadence.
